arts.ttl: I convinced Jack Grealish to stay at Aston Villa after Manchester United agents took him for dinner
arts.sum: Former manager Alex McLeish has spoken about how he helped Aston Villa keep the teenage Jack Grealish, after hearing he was speaking to representatives who were tempting him to sign for Manchester United. The 29-year-old has gone on to win three Premier League titles, a Champions League and an FA Cup as well as the FIFA Club World Cup and UEFA Super Cup. However, it seems Grealish could have easily moved to the red half of Manchester instead.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery makes 'something special' remark ahead of Man City clash
arts.sum: "It is a target, clearly and we want to feel comfortable again and strong at Villa Park," Emery said when asked if his team can embark on another long winning run at home. Unai Emery's side are also on a seven-match unbeaten home run in the Premier League, while their only defeat in the past 13 top-flight games at Villa Park was 2-0 against Arsenal in August.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker's teammates asked security to 'remove' Lauryn Goodman from bar
arts.sum: Lauryn Goodman was asked by security to leave an area of a London bar after she was seen downing shots bought by Kyle Walker's teammate, Jordan Pickford

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola backs Erling Haaland to deliver if Manchester City ‘play better’
arts.sum: The Norway striker has scored just once in his last five appearances, with City struggling to create chances.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star beats Kevin De Bruyne & Lionel Messi to prestigious playmaker award
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has on Friday seen his ongoing excellence on the creative front recognised. This comes amid confirmation that the England international has been named The Best…

arts.ttl: Judge in Man City's 115 charges case is an Arsenal fan and will be replaced soon

arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has some key players running the disciplinary tightrope

arts.sum: Manchester United would seem to be setting their sights on Serie A again for January,...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola succession plan in tatters as 42-year-old rules himself out of Man City job
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta effectively rules out replacing his former mentor Pep Guardiola at Manchester City when the latter leaves the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Man City games Ruben Dias could miss as Pep Guardiola confirms crushing injury blow
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at which Manchester City matches Ruben Dias will miss as Pep Guardiola confirms a new injury for the Portuguese centre-back.
